subcodes.first_line: God hath spoken in the tree of separation: Be patient for me, O friends! Beware that ye be not careless
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره الفراق ان یا ایها الاحباب فاصبرون ایاکم ان لاتغفلوا عن ذکرنا ثم
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @presence of; reunion with God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @personal instructions
